prose:
**Pyridine most electrophilic site (Fukui f⁺)** — DFT, tier “standard” (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, exact integrals; density fitting off) in PySCF (version as shipped in chemkit), gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: fixed input geometry read from `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/pyridine/pyridine.xyz` (no optimization). Three single-point SCFs (neutral, +1, −1) all converged; integrity checks passed (`trustworthy: true`).
Most electrophilic atom: N (atom 1) with f⁺ = 0.48422572.

Command:
```
/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py fukui \
  /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/pyridine/pyridine.xyz \
  --method dft --tier standard --charge 0 --mult 1 \
  --stdout path --out pyridine_fukui_dft.json
```
Live log (SCF cycles, optimizer steps) is being written to `fukui_<timestamp>.out` in your current directory — feel free to `tail -f` it.
